mapper.select: SELECT FROM cs_role WHERE deleted = FALSE ORDER BY id
SELECT FROM cs_role WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE
SELECT FROM cs_role WHERE role_code = #{roleCode} AND deleted = FALSE

SELECT r.id,r.role_code,r.role_name,r.description,r.enabled,r.created_by,r.created_at,r.updated_by,r.updated_at,r.deleted FROM cs_role r JOIN cs_user_role ur ON r.id = ur.role_id AND ur.deleted = FALSE WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.deleted = FALSE AND r.enabled = TRUE ORDER BY r.id
mapper.update: UPDATE cs_role SET role_code = #{roleCode}, role_name = #{roleName}, description = COALESCE(#{description}, ''), enabled = COALESCE(#{enabled}, TRUE), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE
UPDATE cs_role SET deleted = TRUE, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE
